templates.title: Interview Templates
templates.description: Reusable question sets you can start a new interview from.

empty.title: No templates yet
empty.description: Create a template to reuse a question set across interviews.

list.loadError: We couldn't refresh the template list.

form.positionPlaceholder: Choose an existing one or type a new one
form.questionsDescription: Pick the questions this template includes.
form.questionsUnavailableDescription: Some questions saved in this template are no longer available and were dropped from the selection. Add at least one question before saving.

prefill.bannerDescription: Questions and position are prefilled. Add a candidate and tweak anything before creating.
prefill.templateMissing: We couldn't load that template, so nothing was prefilled. You can still build the interview manually.
prefill.interviewMissing: We couldn't load that interview, so nothing was prefilled. You can still build it manually.

delete.confirmDescription: This removes the template. Interviews already created from it are not affected.
